description: False-positive pin (ACCEPTED fail-closed trade-off, R9/U6): the user asks for an example tool-call payload and the model answers with a bare JSON object that matches the tool-call shape. Shape-based detection cannot distinguish a quoted example from a real leak, so it is suppressed to the fallback -- strictly safer than ever showing a leaked call raw. Pinned by tests/unit/agent/test_authority_gates_validity.py::TestLoopLeakHandling::test_tool_shaped_json_answer_is_suppressed_fail_closed. NOTE: is_fallback is false -- the loop-seam suppression returns the fallback TEXT, and the structured flag is set only when the _finalize_turn backstop itself substitutes the text (pinned inconsistency, see corpus README).
user_messages: show me an example tool-call payload
